qa_pairs.question: Which accounts have savings balances of at least 999999999.0?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT accounts.custid FROM accounts
JOIN savings ON accounts.custid = savings.custid
WHERE savings.balance >= 999999999.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which accounts entities having at least one related savings record (linked on accounts.custid = savings.custid) with balance at least '999999999.0'?
